label: Games
calculation: Count of games/results aggregated from the schedule/results dataset.

label: Wins
calculation: Count of games/results aggregated from the schedule/results dataset.

label: Losses
calculation: Count of games/results aggregated from the schedule/results dataset.

label: Ties
calculation: Count of games/results aggregated from the schedule/results dataset.

label: Record
calculation: Formatted string derived from Wins–Losses–Ties.

label: Win %
calculation: Wins divided by Games (games played), expressed as a proportion.

label: Games Scheduled
calculation: Aggregated from game results (counts and simple derived fields).

label: Games Remaining
calculation: Aggregated from game results (counts and simple derived fields).

label: Points For
calculation: Sum of team points scored across all played games.

label: Points Against
calculation: Sum of opponent points allowed across all played games.

label: PPG
calculation: PointsFor divided by Games (points per game).

label: OPPG
calculation: PointsAgainst divided by Games (opponent points per game).

label: Margin/G
calculation: Average of (team score − opponent score) per played game.

label: Margin Std Dev
calculation: Standard deviation of per-game margins over the specified window.

label: Margin Std (L10)
calculation: Standard deviation of per-game margins over the specified window.

label: L5 PPG
calculation: Computed over the team’s last 5 games only (same definition as the full-season stat).

label: L5 Margin/G
calculation: Computed over the team’s last 5 games only (same definition as the full-season stat).

label: Last 5 Margin/G
calculation: Computed over the team’s last 5 games only (same definition as the full-season stat).

label: Last 10 Margin/G
calculation: Computed over the team’s last 10 games only (same definition as the full-season stat).

label: Highest Score
calculation: Aggregated from per-game scores and margins (sums, averages, and extremes).

label: Lowest Score
calculation: Aggregated from per-game scores and margins (sums, averages, and extremes).

label: Highest Margin
calculation: Average of (team score − opponent score) per played game.

label: Lowest Margin
calculation: Average of (team score − opponent score) per played game.

label: Offensive Eff
calculation: Derived from points and an estimated possessions model; NetEff = OffEff − DefEff.

label: Defensive Eff
description: Defensive efficiency (pts allowed per 100 poss estimate)
calculation: Derived from points and an estimated possessions model; NetEff = OffEff − DefEff.

label: Net Efficiency
calculation: Derived from points and an estimated possessions model; NetEff = OffEff − DefEff.

label: Expected Wins
description: Expected wins based on game-by-game win probabilities
calculation: Sum of game-level win probabilities across all scheduled games (expected number of wins).

label: SOS (EWP)
description: Strength of schedule via expected win percentage
calculation: Strength of schedule derived from expected win probabilities against opponents.

label: Schedule-Adj Wins
description: Actual wins minus expected wins (luck-adjusted performance)
calculation: Actual Wins minus ExpectedWins (positive = outperforming expectation; negative = underperforming).

label: Win %
calculation: Wins divided by Games (proportion).

label: Opponents' Win %
description: Average win percentage of opponents (excluding games vs this team)
calculation: Average opponent win percentage, excluding games vs this team.

label: Opponents' Opp Win %
calculation: Average of opponents’ OWP (second-order strength of schedule).

label: RPI
calculation: Rating Percentage Index: 0.25*WP + 0.50*OWP + 0.25*OOWP

label: Q1 Games
description: Games in Quadrant 1 (best opponents, by location)
calculation: Aggregated from game results (counts and simple derived fields).

calculation: Aggregated from game results (counts and simple derived fields).

calculation: Computed from Wins − ExpectedWins; LuckZ is the standardized (z-score) version across teams.
